name: Mirant Corporation
description: Mirant Corporation was a prominent Atlanta-based energy company that specialized in the production and marketing of electric power. Originally spun off from Southern Company in 2001, the firm operated a significant portfolio of power plants across the United States, the Caribbean, and the Philippines. Mirant focused on competitive energy markets, managing thousands of megawatts of generating capacity. Following a period of financial restructuring and bankruptcy proceedings, the company eventually merged with RRI Energy in 2010 to form GenOn Energy, which was later acquired by NRG Energy, marking the end of Mirant as an independent entity.
